---
title: "FLORA Converter - PubPeer Comments"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

### Load Converter

```{r load-converter}
source("R/flora_converter.R")
```

### Functions to shorten lengthy references

```{r helper-functions}
shorten_apa <- function(ref) {
  if (is.na(ref) || nchar(trimws(ref)) == 0) {
    return(ref)
  }

  year_match <- regmatches(ref, regexpr("\\(\\d{4}\\)", ref))
  if (length(year_match) == 0) {
    return(ref)
  }

  year <- year_match[1]

  author_str <- trimws(strsplit(ref, year, fixed = TRUE)[[1]][1])
  first_author_family <- trimws(strsplit(author_str, ",")[[1]][1])
  comma_count <- lengths(regmatches(author_str, gregexpr(",", author_str)))
  rest <- paste0(year, trimws(strsplit(ref, year, fixed = TRUE)[[1]][2]))

  if (comma_count >= 3) {
    paste0(first_author_family, " et al. ", rest)
  } else {
    paste0(author_str, " ", rest)
  }
}
```

## Load And Clean Data

```{r load-clean-data}
data <- csv_to_flora_json("data/flora.csv")
df <- flora_json_to_df(data)

# remove outcomes that are termed uninformative or unclear
df <- df %>% filter(outcome!= "unclear") %>% filter(outcome != "uninformative")
df <- df %>% filter(!(is.na(apa_ref_r)))

#remove source that is not in main article
df <- df %>%
  filter(!stringr::str_detect(outcome_quote_source, 
    regex("supplementary material|supplementary|supplemental|materials|github|\\bSM\\b|table|appendix",
          ignore_case = TRUE)))
df <- df |>
    mutate(across(where(is.character), str_squish))

df$apa_ref_r_sh <- sapply(df$apa_ref_r, shorten_apa)

```


### Match the DOI of the replication reference with the open-access DOI.

```{r matchingDoi}
extract_doi_id <- function(url) {
  if (is.na(url) || nchar(trimws(url)) == 0) return(NA)
  m <- regmatches(url, regexpr("(?i)10\\.\\d{4,}[/\\S]+", url, perl = TRUE))
  if (length(m) == 0) return(NA)
  m <- tolower(trimws(m))
  m <- gsub("\\.(pdf|html|htm|xml|csv|txt)$", "", m)
  m <- gsub("[[:punct:]]+$", "", m)
  m
}

df <- df |>
  mutate(oa_url_r_matched = ifelse(
    !is.na(oa_url_r) &
    !is.na(doi_r) &
    map_chr(oa_url_r, extract_doi_id) == tolower(trimws(doi_r)),
    NA_character_,
    oa_url_r
  ))


```



### Generate PubPeer Messages
```{r generate-messages-function}
generate_flora_messages <- function(df) {
  messages <- list()

  for (doi in unique(df$doi_o)) {
    rows <- df[df$doi_o == doi, ]
    rows$apa_ref_r_sh <- sapply(rows$apa_ref_r, shorten_apa)
    n <- nrow(rows)

    n_replications <- sum(tolower(rows$type) == "replication", na.rm = TRUE)
    n_reproductions <- sum(tolower(rows$type) == "reproduction", na.rm = TRUE)

    attempt_parts <- c(
      if (n_replications > 0) {
        paste0(
          n_replications,
          " replication attempt",
          if (n_replications != 1) "s" else ""
        )
      },
      if (n_reproductions > 0) {
        paste0(
          n_reproductions,
          " reproduction attempt",
          if (n_reproductions != 1) "s" else ""
        )
      }
    )

    header <- paste0(
      "**",
      paste(attempt_parts, collapse = " and "),
      " of this paper ",
      if ((n_replications + n_reproductions) != 1) "have" else "has",
      " been recorded in the FORRT Library of Reproduction and ",
      "Replication Attempts (FLoRA).",
      "**"
    )

    rep_counter <- 0
    repro_counter <- 0

    entries <- vapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {
      r <- rows[i, ]

      if (n == 1) {
        label <- ""
      } else if (tolower(r$type) == "replication") {
        rep_counter <<- rep_counter + 1
        label <- paste0("**Replication ", rep_counter, "**\n")
      } else {
        repro_counter <<- repro_counter + 1
        label <- paste0("**Reproduction ", repro_counter, "**\n")
      }

      quote_source_line <- if (!is.na(r$outcome_quote_source)) {
        paste0("\n> **Quote source:** ", r$outcome_quote_source)
      } else {
        ""
      }

      oa_link <- if (!is.na(r$oa_url_r_matched) && nchar(trimws(r$oa_url_r_matched)) > 0) {
        paste0(" [Open Access](", r$oa_url_r_matched, ")")
      } else {
        ""
      }

      paste0(
        label,
        "\n> ", r$apa_ref_r_sh, oa_link, "\n",
        "> \n",
        "> **The authors reported the replication as:** ", r$outcome, "\n",
        "> **Quote:** ", r$outcome_quote,
        quote_source_line
      )
    }, character(1))

    footer <- paste0(
      "Manual inspection may help to assess what led to the described outcome. ",
      "Future research can learn from replications and build on them. More ",
      "information about why and how we submitted this automated comment can be ",
      "found [here](https://github.com/forrtproject/flora-pubpeer/blob/main/README.md)\n\n",
      "RepNote Team"
    )

    messages[[doi]] <- paste(c(header, entries, footer), collapse = "\n\n\n")
  }

  messages
}
```

### Create Message CSV

```{r create-message-csv}
msgs <- generate_flora_messages(df)

msgs_df <- data.frame(
  doi_o = names(msgs),
  message = unlist(msgs),
  row.names = NULL,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) |>
  mutate(
    message = str_replace_all(message, "\\[Open Access\\]", "\U0001F513 [Open Access]")
  )

readr::write_csv(msgs_df, "data/msgs.csv")

View(msgs_df)

```
